Build instructions for the JerryScript library on the RIOT STM32F4 target platform.

# Purpose
This Makefile is used to automate the build process for a project targeting the RIOT operating system on STM32F4 microcontrollers. It defines several variables and rules to manage the compilation and linking of the `libjerry` library, which is part of the JerryScript engine. The `BUILD_DIR` and `COPYTARGET` variables specify the directories for build output and target binaries, respectively. The `EXT_CFLAGS` variable sets additional compiler flags for the ARM Cortex-M4 architecture. The `all` target depends on `libjerry` and `riot-jerry`, ensuring that the library is built and integrated with the RIOT-specific components. The `flash` target is used to program the microcontroller, while the `clean` target removes build artifacts.
